testsuite.name: AlertEventKafkaConsumer

testcase.name: consume: numeric value as Double â†’ parses correctly
consume: invalid numeric string â†’ value is null
consume: numeric value as String â†’ parsed to Double
consume: valid payload â†’ persists, publishes, acks
consume: null field values â†’ saves with nulls, still acks
consume: repository throws â†’ does NOT ack (retry eligible)
consume: notification publish throws â†’ does NOT ack
consume: numeric value as Integer â†’ promoted to Double
consume: missing detectedAt â†’ defaults to Instant.now

testsuite.system-out:
2026-03-31T23:47:57.807+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Alert persisted and pushed: sensor=ENV-001 severity=CRITICAL 2026-03-31T23:47:57.808+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Alert persisted and pushed: sensor=ENV-001 severity=CRITICAL 2026-03-31T23:47:57.810+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Alert persisted and pushed: sensor=ENV-001 severity=CRITICAL 2026-03-31T23:47:57.811+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Alert persisted and pushed: sensor=ENV-001 severity=CRITICAL 2026-03-31T23:47:57.813+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Alert persisted and pushed: sensor=null severity=null 2026-03-31T23:47:57.814+07:00 ERROR 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.kafka.AlertEventKafkaConsumer : Failed to process alert event from Kafka: DB timeout
